summary: Phase J2 Journey page features fully tested. All 16 backend tests pass. Frontend verified on BYU (coaches), Florida (timeline), and Stanford (overdue follow-up) Journey pages.

issues: ERR_BLOCKED_BY_RESPONSE.NotSameOrigin errors for external university logo resources - cosmetic only, not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Coach Watch Alert is MOCKED as always 'Staff Stable' - this is expected per the requirements
context_for_next_testing_agent: J2 Journey page features complete. Engagement endpoint GET /api/athlete/engagement/{program_id} returns {total_opens, total_clicks, unique_opens, timeline}. Engagement stats are 0 since no email tracking data exists yet (expected). Coach Watch badge is mocked as 'Staff Stable'. kb_coaches may be null for programs without knowledge base data. Show more/less only visible for messages > 150 chars.

mocked_apis.Coach Watch Alert: Always shows 'Staff Stable' green badge - this is intentionally mocked

engagement_endpoint: Response has total_opens, total_clicks, unique_opens, timeline fields
Stats are 0 when no engagement_events exist (expected)
Works for multiple programs (Stanford, Tampa, Florida)
programs_with_coaches: Coach objects have coach_id, coach_name, role, email fields
kb_coaches can be null or array (for CoachSocialLinks)
journey_timeline: Events have event_type, date, content fields for ConversationBubble
Multiple event types supported (email_sent, email_received, camp, phone_call)
j1_features_regression: Programs have signals for engagement stats sidebar
Match scores endpoint still returns scores array

j2_coach_watch_badge: data-testid='coach-watch-badge' present in coaches card header
j2_engagement_stats_strip: Shows Opens/Clicks/Unique counts (0 since no tracking data)
j2_conversation_bubble: Center milestone events (data-testid='conv-milestone') display with icons
Show more/less only appears for messages > 150 chars
j2_coach_social_links: CoachSocialLinks component renders when kb_coaches has social_links
j1_features_intact: Match score badge working (64% Match on Stanford)
Risk badges working (Roster Tight, Timeline Awareness)
Overdue follow-up card showing (3 DAYS OVERDUE on Stanford)
